# Knowledge Vault

> A comprehensive technical knowledge base with 558+ curated articles across 22 domains. Covers software engineering, data science, DevOps, security, and more. Designed for software engineers and LLM agents seeking reliable, structured technical reference material.

This knowledge base contains deep technical articles organized by domain. Each article follows a consistent structure: definition, key concepts, code examples, gotchas, and related links. Content is in English, curated from multiple authoritative sources, and regularly updated.

## Kafka & Message Queues
- [Event Sourcing & CQRS](https://happyin.space/kafka/event-sourcing-and-cqrs/): Event-driven architecture patterns, CQRS implementation, event stores, and message replay strategies

## Python
- [FastAPI Introduction](https://happyin.space/python/fastapi-introduction/): FastAPI framework core concepts, async request handling, Pydantic validation, OpenAPI generation

## SQL & Databases
- [PostgreSQL 17 Architecture](https://happyin.space/sql-databases/postgresql-17-architecture-and-query-tuning/): PostgreSQL internals, query planner, MVCC, indexing strategies, performance tuning

## DevOps & Infrastructure
- [Docker Fundamentals](https://happyin.space/devops/docker-fundamentals/): Container lifecycle, Dockerfile best practices, multi-stage builds, networking, volumes

## Security
- [Web Application Security](https://happyin.space/security/web-application-security/): OWASP Top 10, XSS prevention, CSRF protection, SQL injection, authentication security

## LLM & AI Agents
- [RAG Fundamentals](https://happyin.space/llm-agents/rag-fundamentals/): Retrieval-Augmented Generation architecture, vector databases, chunking strategies, embedding models

## Rust
- [Ownership & Borrowing](https://happyin.space/rust/ownership-and-borrowing/): Rust ownership system, borrowing rules, lifetimes, memory safety without garbage collection

## Web Frontend
- [React State & Hooks](https://happyin.space/web-frontend/react-state-and-hooks/): React hooks API, state management patterns, useEffect lifecycle, custom hooks

## SEO & Marketing
- [Search Engine Mechanics](https://happyin.space/seo-marketing/search-engine-mechanics/): How search engines crawl, index, and rank content, PageRank, semantic search

## iOS & Mobile
- [SwiftUI Basics](https://happyin.space/ios-mobile/swiftui-basics-and-first-app/): SwiftUI declarative UI framework, views, modifiers, state management, navigation

## Optional
- [Contributing Guide](https://happyin.space/contributing/): How to contribute articles, style guide, quality standards
